name: Hex Glow
explanation: A 6-voice single-VCO polysynth in the Korg Polysix lineage. One VCO (saw) plus a square sub per voice, a resonant low-pass with its own envelope and an amp envelope; the whole poly mix runs through the Polysix's signature effects section — here a 4-stage modulated allpass phaser (the distinct hook versus the factory's chorus polys). Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Sub, Phaser and Level.
